tooling_notes: The PI Agent is the dialogue orchestrator. The backend only stores raw session state and accepts results.
Use reply for pure conversational turns or focused clarification questions.
Use init when the user is defining or replacing the target in the latest frame.
Use track when an active target already exists and the session should continue on the latest frame.
Use rewrite_memory after a successful init or track when you want to refresh the compact tracking memory before posting the final result.

tools.name: reply
tools.description: Format a conversational or clarification response into a backend agent-result payload without changing the tracked target.

text.description: Short natural-language answer to the user.

needs_clarification.description: Whether the response is asking the user to clarify.

clarification_question.description: Focused follow-up question when clarification is required.

found.description: Optional override for whether the target is currently considered found.

tools.name: init
tools.description: Run the skill localization capability on the latest frame to bind a new target from the current user description.

target_description.description: Concise user-facing description of the new target to initialize.

tools.name: track
tools.description: Run the skill localization capability on the latest frame to continue tracking the active target.

user_text.description: Optional latest user note for this tracking turn. Defaults to a generic continuation.

tools.name: rewrite_memory
tools.description: Rewrite compact tracking memory after a successful init or track result. Prefer using the rewrite_memory_input returned by init or track.
